name: Tex-Mex Chicken 'n' Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 package chicken taco seasoning mix (1.04 oz.)
4 chicken breast halves, skinless, boneless, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 5-quart electric slow cooker, combine all ingredients except the chilies and garlic pepper.
2. Cover and cook on low heat setting for 4 to 4-1/2 hours, or until rice is tender and chicken is cooked through; avoid overcooking as this will cause the rice to become mushy.
3. Stir in green chiles and garlic pepper. Serve immediately.
